appraisal_events.evidence: « …l’air d’indifférence absolue ou de raillerie… n’était pas plus sincère… Car ce regard-là était un regard autre… venu des profondeurs… ne pouvait s’empêcher d’aller naïvement aux jeunes gens. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator unmasks Charlus’s insincere attitudes toward men and his superficial compliments to women, highlighting an involuntary, revealing gaze toward young men that undercuts his social performance.

status_effects.explanation: Being exposed as insincere and driven by a revealing, involuntary gaze lowers Charlus’s local esteem in the narrated frame.
